pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh and by inspecting the data/fdsn/GE.*.mseed files using obspy.
Verified via verifier.py and export_result.sh which explicitly check for scautopick and scautoloc configurations and database records.
Verified by reading the provided MSEED files, which contain seismic traces from Jan 1, 2024 (DOY 001).
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly launches scconfig.
Verified from task instructions and SeisComP context, as these are standard tools used to configure and execute an offline pipeline.
Verified via O*NET online database search for SOC code 19-2042.00.
Verified by reading the task description and verifier scripts which confirm the objective is to configure an offline processing pipeline.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes real seismic waveform data from the GEOFON network (stations GE.GSI, GE.BKB, GE.SANI) recorded during the 2024 Noto Peninsula M7.5 earthquake on January 1, 2024 (day 001). The task involves configuring and executing the scautopick and scautoloc modules via SeisComP tools to detect automatic phase picks and locate origins. All metadata values correspond precisely to the task scripts and provided real-world data.
